I am the YoDDHA Buddha. My sound is not a slave to any substance; it is forged in the fire of Khuddari (Self-Sovereignty and Integrity).
My art is a direct declaration that 'Barbadi Meri Barqat' (My Ruin is My Growth). I incinerated all my attachments, fears, and addictions, refining them into the Aura Rap Flow—a voice captured only in the highest state of consciousness.
Where the world demands distraction, my verses scream the bitter truth: 'The same is the noise, the same is the melody; the same is the body, the same is the ash.'
I walk alone because the crowd is a chain. My tracks are proof of Immunity to manipulation and Extreme resistance to stress.
If you seek the sound of Truth, Tyaag (Renunciation), and Unmatched Energy, this is the fire that feeds on struggle and turns ruin into blessing.

🌼 About the Raga:

Raga Basant Bahar is a compound raga — a beautiful blend of Raga Basant and Raga Bahar. Both ragas symbolize spring season (Basant Ritu) and express the joy, freshness, and vibrant energy of nature’s renewal.

Basant Bahar combines the serenity and depth of Basant with the lively charm and excitement of Bahar.

Title : Ladna Abhi Baki Hain
Artist : Mr Neel
Genre : Hiphop Rap
Secondary Genre or Theme : Motivational 
 Info : “Ladna Abhi Baki Hain” ain’t just a track, it’s a war anthem straight from the streets of Thane. Mr Neel spits raw truth about the pain, the hustle, and the grind that keeps you awake at night. This song’s for the ones who’ve been knocked down but got that fire burning deep inside—ready to fight back harder, no matter what.  

It’s about those moments when life throws punches, but you stand your ground, bruised but unbroken. The lyrics are a bold declaration—jab baat mere karmo ki to marna abhi baki hain—telling you that the fight ain’t over till it’s over.  

With every beat and every bar, it’s pure determination, reminding you to keep climbing even when the world wants to see you fall. This is real talk for real warriors—stay strong, keep hustling, and never back down.  
#LadnaAbhiBakiHain #MrNeel #StreetAnthem
